general.title: The Constitutional Convention
general.author: James Madison
general.description: A printing of James Madison's meticulous daily notes from the Constitutional Convention, giving us our best and only look inside the decision-making of the framers. Presented with modern punctuation and spelling, judicious cuts, and helpful notes-plus fascinating background information on every delegate and an overview of the tumultuous times-here is the great drama of how the Constitution came to be, from the opening statements to the final votes.

general.title: The Constitution
general.author: The Convention Delegates
general.description: A smart, pocket-sized, hardcover printing of the final US Constitution, drafted painstakingly over 80+ days of work by the Convention delegates.

books.title: You Never Forget Your First
books.author: Alexis Coe
books.description: In the first biography of George Washington written by a woman, Alexis Coe examines some of the myths and legends surrounding the founding father and finds what truths lay behind them... if any.
